title: wb-narrative.control
description: Left-pane control panel snapshot: routing config + running state

tier.description: Selected narrative tier, null if auto-detect

mode.description: Selected pipeline mode, null if using tier default

autoDetect.description: Whether auto genre/tier detection is enabled

userInput.description: Current text in the story input box (may be partial draft)

runningRunId.description: Run ID of the currently executing pipeline, null if idle

runningEntryKey.description: Output directory key of the running pipeline
